summary: Frontend-only testing of the Indian shopping list app. All 4 tabs (List, History, Insights, Profile) render correctly with mock data. All interactive features work as expected.

react_native_issues.issue: useNativeDriver warnings in console: 'Animated: useNativeDriver is not supported because the native animated module is missing.' - This is expected in Expo web preview and not a real issue.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All screens tested and passing. App uses 100% mock data from /app/frontend/src/data/mockData.ts. No backend integration.

features_tested.home_screen_budget_card: PASS - ₹793 spent, ₹4,000 budget, progress bar visible
features_tested.item_checkbox_toggle: PASS - tapping toggles checked state with strikethrough
features_tested.add_price_modal: PASS - opens on '+ Price' tap, allows price entry and save
features_tested.fab_opens_add_item_sheet: PASS - FAB opens Add Item bottom sheet
features_tested.add_item_sheet_inputs: PASS - text input, price input, category chips, Voice and Scan buttons all present
features_tested.add_item_flow: PASS - typed name, selected category, tapped Add Item - item appeared in list
features_tested.voice_button: PASS - simulated 2.5s delay then fills item name with 'Fresh Paneer 500g'
features_tested.history_tab: PASS - trip summary card with stats visible, expandable trip cards
features_tested.insights_tab: PASS - weekly bar chart, category breakdown bars visible
features_tested.profile_tab: PASS - user info, budget card, lists section, settings with toggles
features_tested.budget_edit_modal: PASS - Edit button opens 'Set Monthly Budget' modal with input and Save/Cancel
